_expected_validation: pass: all 7 risk_review categories present and valid
summary: Add a JWT authentication endpoint to the REST API using an existing auth library.

phases.title: Implement JWT endpoint handler
phases.objective: Create the JWT authentication endpoint and tests.
acceptance_criteria: Endpoint returns signed JWT on valid credentials

risks.risk: JWT secret rotation not in scope

risk_review.evidence_source: Single-record auth query; no bulk data access.
JWT signing is O(1); no performance risk identified.
Stateless endpoint; no shared mutable state.
Endpoint issues auth tokens — must validate credentials before signing.
Uses existing JWT library already in package.json.
Standard REST endpoint; existing deployment pipeline applies.

success_criteria: Endpoint returns JWT on valid credentials

handoff.prompt: Execute phases as planned. PLAN_REVIEW is required for SMALL tier per runtime policy.
